Bash(python -c "
import sys, fitz
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Firmware Projects/DMF-Motherboard-R1/Datasheets/ADC - LTC2338IMS-18#PBF.pdf'\)
for page_num in range\(min\(12, len\(doc\)\)\):

        print\(f'\\n--- PAGE {page_num+1} ---'\)
        print\(text[:4000]\)
")

import sys, fitz
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
doc = fitz.open\(r'C:\\DMF Board\\Firmware\\DMFBoard\\DMFDriverG1_R1\\schematic\\DMFDriver.pdf'\)
# Page 1 is the TopLevel - look for ADCIn net connections
text = doc[0].get_text\(\)
# Find all lines with ADCIn
for line in text.split\('\\n'\):
    if 'ADCIn' in line or 'VI0' in line or 'VI1' in line or 'VVto' in line or 'DACHV' in line:
        print\(line\)
PYEOF)

Bash("C:\\Users\\CamCarrillo\\AppData\\Local\\Python\\bin\\python3.exe" << 'PYEOF'
import sys, fitz
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
doc = fitz.open\(r'C:\\DMF Board\\Firmware\\DMFBoard\\DMFDriverG1_R1\\schematic\\DMFDriver.pdf'\)
text = doc[0].get_text\(\)
# Print all text to find the net connections
lines = text.split\('\\n'\)
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if any\(x in line for x in ['ADCIn', 'VI0to', 'VI1to', 'VVto', 'DACHV0_V', 'DACHV1_V']\):
        # Print surrounding context
        start = max\(0, i-2\)
        end = min\(len\(lines\), i+3\)
        for j in range\(start, end\):
            marker = '>>>' if j == i else '   '
            print\(f'{marker} {j}: {lines[j]}'\)
        print\('---'\)
PYEOF)

Bash("C:\\Users\\CamCarrillo\\AppData\\Local\\Python\\bin\\python3.exe" << 'PYEOF'
import sys, fitz
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

# Read LT1990 pages 7-10 for application info and internal resistor values
doc = fitz.open\(r'C:\\DMF Board\\Firmware\\DMFBoard\\DMFDriverG1_R1\\Datasheets\\Amplifier - LT1990AIS8#PBF.pdf'\)
for i in range\(6, min\(12, len\(doc\)\)\):
    text = doc[i].get_text\(\)
    print\(f'--- LT1990 Page {i+1} ---'\)
    print\(text[:3500]\)
    print\(\)

# Now read ADG1421
doc2 = fitz.open\(r'C:\\DMF Board\\Firmware\\DMFBoard\\DMFDriverG1_R1\\Datasheets\\SPST Switch - ADG1421BRMZ.pdf'\)
print\(f'\\n=== ADG1421 \({len\(doc2\)} pages\) ==='\)
for i in range\(min\(4, len\(doc2\)\)\):
    text = doc2[i].get_text\(\)
    print\(f'--- ADG1421 Page {i+1} ---'\)
    print\(text[:3000]\)
    print\(\)
PYEOF)
